Video.summary: Barbie Cutie Reveal outfits look like costumes to me!!! Which is perfect because Rainbow High Dolls are also bringing the costumes this year. So let’s take an up close look at a few looks from Both... and maybe a little costume contest?

Video.summary: Need another Dollhouse for your Dolls? Check out this Fabulous Craft that wont break the bank! We made a Dollar Store Dollhouse PLUS a Doll Bed, Rug and Fuzzy Doll Chair all for under 10 Bucks at the Dollar Store! This craft also makes a great gift!

Video.summary: In Japanese Origami literally means "folding paper". In this programme learn the art of origami with designs that are both simple and rewarding. From the purity and ease of a rowing boat, to the intricacies and precision of a lover's knot, or a flapping bird. These are classic origami designs that will hopefully lead to a love of the craft.
Video.title: Learn Origami

Image.alt: Learn Origami
Learn Origami

Video.summary: This is our first Frog Food of 2021 so let's hit the ground running and try something new: A detailed background! But not too detailed ... remember, baby steps. Join me for a little speed drawing and commentary!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint
Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint

Video.summary: Today we have a Very Special One of a Kind Custom Doll! Craft along with Froggy as she makes a Royal Wedding Made to Move Meghan Duchess of Sussex Custom Doll! From the Simply Fabulous Wedding Gown to a Royal Wedding Background we've got you covered! Happy Crafting

Video.summary: Any mom or grandma likes presents that are made by hand. This box of cards is a perfect size to carry in your purse and bring out when someone asks to see the kids. The box also holds gift cards, business cards and small gifts- style it to fit any occasion! The Mothers Day Card Box is the perfect way to show mom you care all the while giving her something practical to use. Whether she uses this adorable box to hold keepsakes or important business card, it is sure to keep her smiling for days to come.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Mother's Day Card Box

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Mother's Day Card Box
FaveCrafts: Mother's Day Card Box

Video.summary: Get your Dolls ready for Easter with these Fabulous Crafts! From Cute Bunny ears to Chocolate Bunnies ... we've got you covered!
